TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Paiwan Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://pwn.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn, title = {Paiwan Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Kamala Devi Harris (pronounced /'k…ëÀêm…ôl…ô 'de…™vi/ ‚ìò KAH-m…ô-l…ô DAY-vee; yuwra Kuo 20, 1964) a nu nu a Amerikan ku avuncu a ru 49 a a doku a ru Amerika taji a ru 2021, a mu prezident Joe Biden. Harris a nu nu a Democratic Party a ru doku a ru prezident a nu 2024. A mu nu a kabun, a mu nu a African American, ku a mu nu a Asian American a nu vice president, ya so a kabun Afro-Jamaican ku Indian American. A mu nu a ikada a mu iayawan a kabun a U.S. a matakuwan. Ya mu a 2017 to 2021, a mu kavar California a ru U.S. Senate. Ya ikad a, a mu avuncu a general a California.
S.PHON: kama…≠a d…ôvi harris (prunuun ¶…ôd / îk**m…ô…≠…ô îd…ô*vi/ * kah-m…ô-…≠…ô daj-v…ô…ô; juwra kuu **, ****) a nu nu a am…ôrikan ku avun ¶u a ru ** a a duku a ru am…ôrika taji a ru ****, a mu pr…ôzid…ônt *u…ô bid…ôn. harris a nu nu a d…ômu ¶rati ¶ partj a ru duku a ru pr…ôzid…ônt a nu ****. a mu nu a kabun, a mu nu a a*ri ¶an am…ôri ¶an, ku a mu nu a asian am…ôri ¶an a nu vi ¶…ô pr…ôsid…ônt, ja su a kabun a*ru-*amai ¶an ku indian am…ôri ¶an. a mu nu a ikada a mu iajawan a kabun a u.s. a matakuwan. ja mu a **** tu ****, a mu kavar ¶a…≠i*urnia a ru u.s. s…ônat…ô. ja ikad a, a mu avun ¶u a g…ôn…ôra…≠ a ¶a…≠i*urnia.
S.FORM: Kamala Devi Harris (pronounced /'k…ëÀêm…ôl…ô 'de…™vi/ ‚ìò KAH-m…ô-l…ô DAY-vee; yuwra Kuo 20, 1964) a nu nu a Amerikan ku avuncu a ru 49 a a doku a ru Amerika taji a ru 2021, a mu prezident Joe Biden. Harris a nu nu a Democratic Party a ru doku a ru prezident a nu 2024. A mu nu a kabun, a mu nu a African American, ku a mu nu a Asian American a nu vice president, ya so a kabun Afro-Jamaican ku Indian American. A mu nu a ikada a mu iayawan a kabun a U.S. a matakuwan. Ya mu a 2017 to 2021, a mu kavar California a ru U.S. Senate. Ya ikad a, a mu avuncu a general a California.
S.PHON: kama…≠a d…ôvi harris (prunuun ¶…ôd / îk**m…ô…≠…ô îd…ô*vi/ * kah-m…ô-…≠…ô daj-v…ô…ô; juwra kuu **, ****) a nu nu a am…ôrikan ku avun ¶u a ru ** a a duku a ru am…ôrika taji a ru ****, a mu pr…ôzid…ônt *u…ô bid…ôn. harris a nu nu a d…ômu ¶rati ¶ partj a ru duku a ru pr…ôzid…ônt a nu ****. a mu nu a kabun, a mu nu a a*ri ¶an am…ôri ¶an, ku a mu nu a asian am…ôri ¶an a nu vi ¶…ô pr…ôsid…ônt, ja su a kabun a*ru-*amai ¶an ku indian am…ôri ¶an. a mu nu a ikada a mu iajawan a kabun a u.s. a matakuwan. ja mu a **** tu ****, a mu kavar ¶a…≠i*urnia a ru u.s. s…ônat…ô. ja ikad a, a mu avun ¶u a g…ôn…ôra…≠ a ¶a…≠i*urnia.
